/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/motor_msgs/motor_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/motor_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/motor_msgs/_motor_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/orangepi/Documents/ros2_motor_demo/build/motor_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libmotor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so libmotor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
